title: Microsoft Teams Trigger subscription validation failure
symptom: When activating a workflow with a Microsoft Teams Trigger, n8n throws 'Subscription validation request failed'. This indicates that the notification endpoint is not responding correctly.
not_this_if: The trigger is not being used
root_cause: The error occurs because the Microsoft Teams service sends a validation request to the notification endpoint, which must respond with a 200 OK status. If the endpoint does not respond correctly, the subscription cannot be validated, leading to this error.
fix_steps: Ensure that the notification endpoint is correctly configured and accessible.
Check that the endpoint responds with a 200 OK status to validation requests from Microsoft Teams.
Test the endpoint independently to confirm it is functioning as expected.
agent_instruction: Verify the notification endpoint configuration and ensure it responds with a 200 OK status.
